title: Huawei S210I-8T4SX Gigabit smart industrial switch, 2x SFP, 2x SFP+, redundant power
category: Huawei / LAN networks / Switches / eKit Switches
description: Huawei eKitEngine S210I-8T4SX is an industrial L2 switch with an extended temperature range, designed for demanding environments and installation in outdoor or industrial enclosures. It offers 8x 10/100/1000BASE-T ports , 2x GE SFP and 2x 10GE SFP+ uplink ports , and 1x DI/DO interface . It supports both local web interface and cloud management (SNC / eKit App) . Thanks to its passive cooling , IP40 protection , and wide input voltage range of 9.6 - 60 V DC , it is suitable for long-term… 8x GLAN 2x GE SFP + 2x 10GE SFP+ uplink ports 1x DI/DO interface for integration into industrial solutions Passive cooling â silent operation, no fans Industrial design : IP40 protection, surge, reverse polarity, and overheating protection Redundant power supply : 1+1 hot backup option Advanced features : STP/PSTP, ERPS, link aggregation, industrial protocol prioritization (PROFINET, GOOSE) Device 1x 5-pin Phoenix connector for DI/DO ports
